use_cases: Interactive product showcases where users hover to reveal multiple product options
Image galleries with stacked card metaphor for browsing visual content
Feature or benefit displays in SaaS landing pages with engaging hover interaction
Team member or portfolio cards with elegant reveal animation
Testimonial collections with a stacked card design for social proof
ai_summary: An interactive stacked cards component featuring a hover-triggered spread animation powered by Framer Motion. Cards animate apart horizontally with subtle rotation effects, creating an engaging reveal mechanism for showcasing multiple items. Clean white design with subtle shadows and rounded corners suitable for product displays, image galleries, or feature presentations on landing pages and dashboards.
